g.text: | 🟢 Green | Idle | Process blocking on `select()` or `epoll()` |
| 🔴 Red | Reaping | Non-blocking `waitpid` syscall in loop |
| 🟣 Purple | Harvest | Metadata extracted from child exit status |
| 🔷 Teal | Check | Loop termination logic based on PID return |
- `WNOHANG`: Do not block if no child has exited.
- `-1`: Wait for any child process in the current namespace.

text.tspan: | 🟢 Green | Idle | Process blocking on `select()` or `epoll()` |
| 🔴 Red | Reaping | Non-blocking `waitpid` syscall in loop |
| 🟣 Purple | Harvest | Metadata extracted from child exit status |
| 🔷 Teal | Check | Loop termination logic based on PID return |
- `WNOHANG`: Do not block if no child has exited.
- `-1`: Wait for any child process in the current namespace.
